pageContext.name: Naruto
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Kami-Arts present the Naruto 1:6 scale Statue!  Naruto figure in 1:6 size, the statue represents all the team 7 gathered in a single statue. The scene represents all the protagonists of the cult manga in a defensive position ready to attack the enemy.  Kami-Arts wanted to please all the Naruto community by proposing for the first time in statue, all the team reunited Naruto Uzumaki, Sasuke Uchiha, Sakura Haruno, Kakashi Hatake, and… even the ninken Pakkun! Everything starts with this group and it is normal to propose to you the whole team 7 for their first Naruto project. A wise but founding project.
